clones.setupDesc: Create your AI Clone profile with your voice and a reference photo. The AI will use this to generate videos with your own face and voice.
clones.photoTip: Use a high-quality, well-lit portrait photo. Vertical (9:16) works best.
clones.voiceIdTip: Find your Voice ID in ElevenLabs → Voices → click your voice → View API ID.
clones.noLooksSub: Upload a portrait photo of yourself to get started. Use a high-quality, well-lit photo for best results.
clones.generatingTime: This takes 2–3 min. You can leave this page.
clones.genModalTitle: Generate a New Look with AI
clones.genModalDesc: Describe the outfit and setting you want. The AI will generate a new photo of you in that look, preserving your face identity.
clones.describePlaceholder: e.g. standing in a modern office, wearing a navy blazer and white shirt, bright natural light
scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.subtitle: Your library of structured UGC video scripts, organised by methodology and category.
scripts.searchPlaceholder: Search scripts by hook, product, or influencer...
scripts.noScriptsSub: Create your first script using AI or write one manually.
scripts.aiDesc: Configure your script and let AI generate a human-sounding, methodology-driven script in seconds.
scripts.contextPlaceholder: Any specific angles, key benefits, or talking points you want the script to include...
scripts.csvDesc: Fill in one row per script. Required columns are marked below. Save as .csv and upload when ready.
scripts.orClick: or click to browse your computer
scripts.csvNote: Accepts .csv files only -- max 500 rows per upload
scripts.warningNote: Scripts with warnings will still be imported. You can edit them after upload.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Generate videos, images and full ad campaigns by simply chatting with AI.
onboarding.capabilitiesSubtitle: From viral TikToks to high-converting ad creatives. Studio handles it all.
onboarding.ugcDesc: AI influencers hold your product, speak your script, and deliver scroll-stopping content.
onboarding.productShotsDesc: Professional product photography powered by AI — studio quality in seconds.
onboarding.cinematicDesc: Premium brand films with cinematic camera movements and visual storytelling.
onboarding.agentDesc: Type what you want in plain English or Spanish. Your agent automatically handles the scripting, casting, generation, editing and posting.
onboarding.agentExample: "Create a UGC ad with Lexi showing my product and saying it's the best new thing for summer"
onboarding.agentHint: Use @ to reference your products & influencers.
